# devin_org_service_user_role (Resource)

Assigns a role scoped to a single organization to an existing service user. The service user must not already have a role in that organization. Use devin_enterprise_service_user_role for enterprise-wide roles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "devin_roles" "all" {}
data "devin_service_users" "all" {}

locals {
  org_member_role_id = one([
    for r in data.devin_roles.all.roles : r.role_id
    if r.role_type == "org" && r.role_name == "Member"
  ])
  ci_service_user_id = one([
    for su in data.devin_service_users.all.service_users : su.service_user_id
    if su.name == "CI Pipeline"
  ])
}

# Grant an existing service user a role in one organization.
resource "devin_org_service_user_role" "ci_backend" {
  org_id          = devin_organization.backend.org_id
  service_user_id = local.ci_service_user_id
  role_id         = local.org_member_role_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String) Organization ID the role assignment is scoped to.
- `role_id` (String) Role to assign. Must be an org-level role.
- `service_user_id` (String) ID of an existing service user.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Org service user roles are imported with the org ID and the service user ID.
terraform import devin_org_service_user_role.ci_backend org-f1aef3d9f6f349a697e7356810f10b35/service-user-e18cd426ebfe446baf857e62db65e1c3
```
